scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace @streampix/shared && npm run prisma:generate --workspace @streampix/server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @streampix/server" "npm run dev --workspace @streampix/worker" "npm run dev --workspace @streampix/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @streampix/server && npm run build --workspace @streampix/worker && npm run build --workspace @streampix/web
scripts.start:full: concurrently "npm run start --workspace @streampix/server" "npm run start --workspace @streampix/worker" "npm run start --workspace @streampix/web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @streampix/shared && npm run lint --workspace @streampix/server && npm run lint --workspace @streampix/worker && npm run lint --workspace @streampix/web
